title: macaranga depressa
intro: Macaranga depressa, also known as the small-leafed macaranga, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Macaranga depressa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Macaranga depressa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in poultices or applied topically to the affected area.
